2604.26694.title: Unified 4D World Action Modeling from Video Priors with Asynchronous Denoising
2604.26694.paper_summary: We propose X-WAM, a Unified 4D World Model that unifies real-time robotic action execution and high-fidelity 4D world synthesis (video + 3D reconstruction) in a single framework, addressing the critical limitations of prior unified world models (e.g., UWM) that only model 2D pixel-space and fail to balance action efficiency and world modeling quality. To leverage the strong visual priors of pretrained video diffusion models, X-WAM imagines the future world by predicting multi-view RGB-D videos, and obtains spatial information efficiently through a lightweight structural adaptation: replicating the final few blocks of the pretrained Diffusion Transformer into a dedicated depth prediction branch for the reconstruction of future spatial information. Moreover, we propose Asynchronous Noise Sampling (ANS) to jointly optimize generation quality and action decoding efficiency. ANS applies a specialized asynchronous denoising schedule during inference, which rapidly decodes actions with fewer steps to enable efficient real-time execution, while dedicating the full sequence of steps to generate high-fidelity video. Rather than entirely decoupling the timesteps during training, ANS samples from their joint distribution to align with the inference distribution. Pretrained on over 5,800 hours of robotic data, X-WAM achieves 79.2% and 90.7% average success rate on RoboCasa and RoboTwin 2.0 benchmarks, while producing high-fidelity 4D reconstruction and generation surpassing existing methods in both visual and geometric metrics.
2604.26694.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 X-WAM，一個統一的 4D 世界模型，將實時機器人行動執行和高保真 4D 世界合成（視頻 + 3D 重建）統一在一個框架中，解決了先前統一世界模型（例如 UWM）的關鍵限制，這些模型僅建模 2D 像素空間，並未能平衡行動效率和世界建模質量。為了利用預訓練視頻擴散模型的強大視覺先驗，X-WAM 通過預測多視角 RGB-D 視頻來想像未來世界，並通過輕量級結構適應有效獲取空間信息：將預訓練擴散Transformer的最後幾個區塊複製到專用的深度預測分支，以重建未來的空間信息。此外，我們提出了異步噪聲採樣（ANS），以共同優化生成質量和行動解碼效率。ANS 在推理過程中應用專門的異步去噪時間表，快速以較少的步驟解碼行動，以實現高效的實時執行，同時將完整的步驟序列專注於生成高保真的視頻。在訓練期間，ANS 並未完全解耦時間步，而是從它們的聯合分佈中進行採樣，以與推理分佈對齊。X-WAM 在超過 5800 小時的機器人數據上進行預訓練，在 RoboCasa 和 RoboTwin 2.0 基準上達到了 79.2% 和 90.7% 的平均成功率，同時生成的高保真 4D 重建和生成在視覺和幾何指標上超越了現有方法。
2604.26694.author: Jun Guo et.al.
2604.26694.authors: Jun Guo, Qiwei Li, Peiyan Li, Zilong Chen, Nan Sun, Yifei Su, Heyun Wang, Yuan Zhang, Xinghang Li, Huaping Liu
